generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i Depth Camera for visual data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawCameraFeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor providing real-time speed data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor providing real-time steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR
]

instance RawCameraFeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance RawCameraFeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw camera feed data from Intel D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawCameraFeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ClusteredPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered point cloud data from DBSCAN processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks data from Kalman filter processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ClusteredPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance SQLDatabaseData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Stored vehicle state data in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData, ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ISO15622ACCLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlus
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for GPU acceleration and system development"
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication and sensor data handling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService, ACCService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing, including SQL database operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance ACC logic implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and DBSCAN implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointClusteringService
]

instance ISO23247ReferenceArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for system design and integration"
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring including visualization, saving, and reporting of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ACCService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system computation and command generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management of ACC functions including enable/disable, desired speed setting, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksVisualizationInsight, DrivingPathVisualizationInsight
]

instance ObjectTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Object tracking using Kalman filter for real-time object detection"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksInsight
]

instance PointClusteringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Point cloud clustering using DBSCAN algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:provides ClusteredPointCloudInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time UI display of vehicle state and object tracks to enhance driver trust"
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Post-operation analysis report generation from saved vehicle state data"
]

instance ACCCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC command execution for adaptive cruise control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC functionality remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC functionality remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execute emergency braking via vehicle hardware"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks for situational awareness"
]

instance DrivingPathVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of planned driving path for driver trust"
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracked object positions and velocities for situational awareness"
]

instance ClusteredPointCloudInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Clustered point cloud data for object detection"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor actuation converting desired speed to voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation controlled via Physical Twin Entity's Actuation FE"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle built off Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium teleoperated vehicle retrofitted with autonomy components"
    base:contains HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera, SpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals for motor speed adjustments, steering angle commands, and emergency braking generated by the ACC Controlling FE and transmitted via the Actuation FE to the physical vehicle's hardware."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with ≤100 ms end-to-end network latency (per 3GPP 22.185) and 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy across components for safety-critical coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (data processing), User Entity (UI), and Cross-System Data Translation FE; data flows via ROS2 within entities and Wi-Fi between entities."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during design phase for cyber-physical experimentation and compliance validation, and during operation for monitoring and optimization; covers 'as manufactured' (testing) and 'as operated' (real-time) phases of the vehicle lifecycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC implementation follows ISO 15622 Performance Class I (no road curvature); latency and synchronization requirements (100 ms) ensure safety-critical operation; no explicit verification/validation details beyond standards compliance."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; Data Translation FE handles serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions for all data streams."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle's Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity and Data Storage hosted externally (cloud); User Entity accessible via remote UI for operators and developers."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT structure; ISO 15622 for ACC functionality; 3GPP 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical design with 100 ms latency and clock synchronization constraints; no specific cybersecurity measures (e.g., encryption, authentication) detailed in the document."
]
